justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's temporal preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and then asked the user to pick a new time without offering any alternative options, which led to a very long and frustrating conversation.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple avoidable round-trips by not offering alternative options when an appointment was unavailable, instead always asking the user to provide a new date and time.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation was frustrating for the customer due to the agent's inability to proactively suggest alternative appointment times, leading to a repetitive and unproductive exchange.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered poorly by consistently reporting unavailability and then asking the user to pick a new time without offering any alternative options, which led to a very long and frustrating conversation.

judge_scores.overall_notes: The agent's inability to proactively suggest alternative appointment times when a requested slot was unavailable made the conversation very inefficient and frustrating for the user.
